task.title: Strengthen UX Gremlin workflow sequencing
task.request: Add required sequence checks so ux-gremlin fixes incomplete workflow steps before moving to the next phase.
task.problem_statement: UX Gremlin can currently proceed toward Playwright execution before .agent/generated/ux-gremlin.spec.ts has implemented steps, which makes the tests non-executable in practice.

goal: Add a workflow-status command and workflow documentation that block phase advancement until required upstream UX Gremlin artifacts are complete.
success_criteria: workflow-status accepts --phase plan, generate, execute, ingest, and report.
workflow-status exits non-zero with ERROR lines and actionable guidance when required upstream artifacts are missing or incomplete.
execute readiness fails when the generated spec is missing, still has TODO placeholders, still has active requireImplementation calls, or lacks baseline/scenario annotations.
Docs and agent instructions require the ordered gate-and-repair loop.
Regression tests cover missing spec, incomplete spec, ready spec, and plan/generation gate behavior.

scope.summary: Bounded enhancement of the UX Gremlin plugin workflow gate and instructions.

non_goals: Do not make generated Playwright specs pass before users implement them.
Do not hide incomplete specs with soft-skips in workflow readiness.
Do not introduce schemas or migrations unless needed for the new command.
Do not rewrite existing report or ingest behavior.
expected_behavior: Agents use workflow-status before each phase, repair any reported incomplete upstream artifact, rerun the same gate, and only execute Playwright after the generated spec has concrete implementation and required ingest annotations.
current_behavior: The plugin validates plans and generates failing-by-default specs, but the workflow does not provide a deterministic phase-readiness gate for spec implementation before Playwright execution.
test_requirements: workflow-status --phase execute fails when the generated spec is missing.
workflow-status --phase execute fails when a generated spec still contains TODO placeholders or active requireImplementation calls.
workflow-status --phase execute passes for a fixture spec with implemented steps and required annotations.
workflow-status --phase plan and --phase generate reuse existing plan validation behavior.
Run assumption-gate check and change-control check/drift.
rollback_plan: Revert modifications under plugins/ux-gremlin and restore the .agent/session gate artifacts.
stop_conditions: The new command requires external dependencies.
The execute gate cannot distinguish generated placeholders from implemented specs with acceptable false-positive risk.
Existing tests fail due to unrelated behavior outside the allowed scope.
Implementation requires changing unrelated plugin infrastructure.
implementation_plan: Add workflow-status argument parsing and usage text.
Implement plan/generate/execute/ingest/report phase gate helpers with actionable errors.
Add execute spec inspection for missing file, TODO placeholders, active requireImplementation calls, baseline annotation, and scenario annotation.
Update skill, agent, README, and fragments with the required gate-and-repair sequence.
Add node:test coverage for phase gates.
Run npm test and guardrail checks.
final_acceptance_checklist: workflow-status command is documented in command usage and README.
Execute phase is blocked for missing or incomplete generated specs.
Ready implemented spec fixture passes execute phase.
Docs instruct agents to repair failed gates before advancing.
All required verification commands pass or failures are reported.
